category: Phenomena and features related to Earth's Moon
explanation: Eclipse (lunar), Tide, Crater, and Apollo (missions) are all directly associated with or influenced by Earth's Moon. A star is a distinct celestial body that generates its own light, separate from lunar phenomena or features.

category: Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: All items except the Great Wall of China are traditionally listed as one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. The Great Wall is a famous wonder but is not on that specific ancient list.
All words except 'GLIMMER' are verbs that describe distinct types of sounds. 'GLIMMER' describes a faint, wavering light.
